prompt:
A 5 mm red LED lying on a wooden desk next to a breadboard, its clear epoxy dome and two metal leads clearly visible, with the longer anode lead slightly bent for insertion. In the background, a simple circuit on the breadboard shows another red LED lit up with a resistor and a few jumper wires, suggesting that this LED is intended for basic electronics projects. The scene focuses on the LED in the foreground so its size and shape are unmistakable.

Near-future solarpunk electronics aesthetic with warm lighting, tidy tools, and a touch of greenery or a small solar panel at the edge of the frame. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible text. The composition should clearly present the LED as a single component inventory item.
